---
title: "Decision 2 · Positioning"
subtitle: "CRM, Revenue Operations Platform, or AI Readiness Platform?"
---

::: {.page-context}
::: {.pc-crumb}
Decisions <span class="sep">›</span> Positioning
:::
::: {.pc-supports}
**This page supports:** how should the product be positioned to buyers and investors?
:::
::: {.pc-row}
<span class="chip chip-neutral no-dot">Register-driven · D2</span>
<span class="pc-next">[Open the Positioning dashboard](../dashboards/positioning-dashboard.qmd)</span>
:::
:::

The decision record below reads live from `data/sample/decision_register.csv`; its claims read from
`data/sample/claim_register.csv`.

```{python}
#| label: decision-record
#| echo: false
import sys, pathlib
_root = pathlib.Path.cwd()
while _root != _root.parent and not (_root / "src").is_dir():
    _root = _root.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_root))
from IPython.display import HTML
from src.registers import render_decision_record, render_claim_cards
HTML(render_decision_record("D2"))
```

## Claims behind this decision

Each claim is a **hypothesis**. It advances toward grade B only when real discovery evidence meets the
bar shown.

```{python}
#| label: claims
#| echo: false
HTML(render_claim_cards("D2"))
```

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Go deeper.** Long-form reasoning is in
[Working Paper › CRM Positioning](../working-paper/04-crm-positioning.qmd). The AI-readiness claims are
discussed in [Working Paper › AI Readiness](../working-paper/06-ai-readiness.qmd).
:::
